nodes.name: Edolisoma
nodes.summary: Edolisoma（Edolisoma）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联30种鸟类，如山鹃鵙、菲律宾黑鹃鵙、白翅鹃鵙等30种鸟类。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Makira cicadabird
nodes.summary: The Makira cicadabird (Edolisoma salomonis) is a species of bird in the family Campephagidae. It is endemic to the Solomon Islands. It used to be considered a subspecies of the common cicadabird. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Makira cicadabird (Edolisoma salomonis) is a species of bird in the family Campephagidae. It is endemic to the Solomon Islands.

nodes.name: Makira cicadabird
